name: Alva Universal Image
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl gnupg && curl -sS https://dl.yarnpkg.com/debian/pubkey.gpg | gpg --dearmor | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/yarnkey.gpg >/dev/null && echo 'deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/yarnkey.gpg] https://dl.yarnpkg.com/debian/ stable main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y xvfb libnss3-dev libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libgtk-3-0 libgbm-dev && if command -v sdk > /dev/null; then sdk default java 21; fi
